product_summary: The Accounts Payable Automation agent streamlines the full AP workflow from invoice receipt to payment execution by combining AI-powered capture with automated three-way matching and exception handling. It enforces compliance with tax regulations, GDPR requirements, e-invoicing mandates, and anti-fraud controls while scheduling and executing payments. Finance teams gain faster cycle times, lower manual effort, and reduced risk of errors or penalties. Executives see improved cash-flow visibility and measurable cost savings across the payables function.
value_proposition: Automates the end-to-end accounts payable process with AI-driven capture, matching, and compliance validation to accelerate payments while eliminating manual errors and regulatory risk.
technical_summary: The hybrid agent orchestrates AI modules for invoice OCR capture and three-way matching alongside deterministic logic for exception handling, payment scheduling, and compliance validation. It integrates with ERP and accounting systems, payment gateways, and e-invoicing networks through standard APIs while maintaining GDPR data controls and VAT/GST tax rules. Anti-fraud checks are embedded at each stage to ensure secure, auditable transaction flows.
integration_guide:
# Integration Guide — accounts_payable_automation_agent
**Process:** Accounts Payable Automation
**Version:** 1.0.0

## Prerequisites
- Python 3.10+
- Agentic Zero runtime installed
- API credentials configured in .env

## Installation
```bash
# Copy agent to your project
cp accounts_payable_automation_agent.py ./agents/
```

## Basic Usage
```python
from agents.accounts_payable_automation_agent import AccountsPayableAutomationAgentAgent

agent = AccountsPayableAutomationAgentAgent()
result = agent.execute({
    "supplier_invoices": your_supplier_invoices_data,
    "purchase_orders": your_purchase_orders_data,
    "goods_receipts": your_goods_receipts_data,
})
print(result['outputs'])
```

## Supported Systems
- SAP ECC
- SAP S/4HANA
- SAP EWM
- Oracle ERP Cloud
- Oracle JDE

## Tools Required
- OCR_engine
- ERP_API
- BankSystem_API
- Approval_workflow_tool

## Escalation
The agent automatically escalates to human when:
- Duplicate detected
- 3-way match failure unresolved >24h
- Tolerance breach requiring approver
- Payment blocked by compliance flag
api_endpoints: POST /api/v1/agents/accounts_payable_automation_agent/execute — Execute the agent with inputs
GET  /api/v1/agents/accounts_payable_automation_agent/status — Get agent status and metrics
demo_script:
1. Open live dashboard showing 247 pending invoices and €1.2M monthly AP volume; highlight manual bottlenecks and 14-day average cycle time.  
2. Trigger agent on a sample invoice batch: demonstrate AI extraction, 3-way matching, and policy checks in under 45 seconds per document.  
3. Route one invoice through automated approval workflow, surfacing real-time compliance flags (VAT, duplicate detection, segregation of duties).  
4. Display post-processing metrics: cycle time reduced to 2 days, 94% straight-through processing, and €47k monthly error avoidance.  
5. Pull ROI panel: calculate 8.0x multiplier on €699 price, projecting €5,592 net value in first month and payback in <4 days.  
6. Export compliance audit trail for the batch, confirming full traceability and regulatory alignment for executive sign-off.  
7. Close with one-click scaling toggle to full AP volume and summary of projected annual savings.
use_cases: Use case 1: Manufacturing firm processes 12,000 supplier invoices monthly via automated 3-way matching, cutting AP cycle time from 14 days to 4 days and reducing manual labor costs by $180K annually while enforcing VAT/GST tax compliance.

Use case 2: Pharma distributor auto-validates e-invoices under EU mandates for 8,000 monthly transactions, eliminating 95% of compliance audit findings and avoiding €250K in potential fines through built-in GDPR financial data controls.

Use case 3: Food & beverage wholesaler deploys anti-fraud duplicate detection on high-volume invoices, preventing $420K in duplicate payments per year and achieving 100% e-invoicing mandate adherence across 3 countries.

Use case 4: Transport logistics company automates invoice approval workflows for 15,000 fuel and maintenance invoices, reducing late-payment penalties by 85% ($95K annual savings) with real-time VAT/GST validation and fraud scoring.

Use case 5: Multi-sector services provider uses the agent to reconcile 20,000 invoices quarterly, cutting exception handling time by 65% and delivering full GDPR audit trails that reduce external compliance review costs by $120K yearly.

pricing.price_rationale: Level L2 process with complexity score 100/100. Regulated sector surcharge 40% applied
